S&P.title: S&P Top Momentum 10
S&P.desc: Selects the 10 S&P 500 stocks with the strongest momentum every month. It aims to ride U.S. market trends with a dynamic portfolio focused on current leaders.

Nasdaq.title: Nasdaq Top Momentum 10
Nasdaq.desc: Invests in the 10 Nasdaq stocks with the best relative strength, updated monthly. A strategy oriented towards growth and innovative sectors with the greatest upward drive.

EuroStoxx600.title: EU600 Top Momentum 10
EuroStoxx600.desc: Identifies the 10 strongest stocks in the Euro Stoxx 600 among European large, mid, and small caps. Offers broad exposure to the most solid trends in the continental market.

EuroStoxx50.title: EU50 Top Momentum 10
EuroStoxx50.desc: Selects the top 10 stocks among the Euro Stoxx 50 blue chips. Aims to combine quality and momentum across the Eurozone's leading companies.

ITMom10.title: ITA Top Momentum 10
ITMom10.desc: Monthly portfolio of the 10 Italian stocks with the highest relative performance. Concentrated on the strongest opportunities within Piazza Affari.

UKMom10.title: UK Top Momentum 10
UKMom10.desc: Selects the 10 strongest stocks in the British market every month. Provides exposure to the best UK trends across energy, financials, and consumer sectors.

FRMom10.title: CAC40 Top Momentum 10
FRMom10.desc: Invests in the 10 French stocks with the highest momentum, updated monthly. Strategy focused on the leaders of the Paris market.

DEMom10.title: DAX Top Momentum 10
DEMom10.desc: Selects the 10 strongest German stocks based on trend and relative performance. Aims to leverage the industrial and financial strength of the German market.

SPMom10.title: IBEX Top Momentum 10
SPMom10.desc: Portfolio of the 10 Spanish stocks with the highest momentum, reviewed monthly. Provides exposure to Iberian market leaders during their periods of greatest strength.
